title: Staff of Vektr Group at Federal High Court Abuja
description: Mr. Solomon Edet Solomon Staff Vektr Group (right) during the commencement of his trial  on allegations bordering on operating as fund managers without registration by the Securities and Exchange Comm
html: Mr. Solomon Edet Solomon Staff Vektr Group (right) during the commencement of his trial  on allegations bordering on operating as fund managers without registration by the Securities and Exchange Commission among others at the Federal High Court Abuja at the weekend
